description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear wireless headphones, featuring a sleek, modern design with a matte black finish. The headband is smoothly curved and padded for comfort, connecting two large, oval-shaped ear cups that fully enclose the ears. The ear cups are thick and cushioned, likely made from synthetic leather or foam, providing both noise isolation and comfort for extended use. The exterior of the ear cups is smooth, with minimal visible seams, and one side displays the 'SONY' brand logo in white. The headphones appear to have integrated controls, possibly touch-sensitive or with subtle physical buttons, and are designed to be foldable or adjustable for portability. This type of device is commonly used for personal audio listening in urban environments, such as on public transport, in parks, or while walking.
description: A pair of matte black, over-ear wireless headphones with cushioned ear cups and a curved padded headband. The design is sleek and modern, with the SONY logo visible on one ear cup.
description_view_0: Front view showing both large, cushioned ear cups and the smoothly curved headband.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the ear cup and the SONY logo on the exterior.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of both ear cups and the headband's arch.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with the SONY logo visible on the other ear cup.
